cases.name: transport.invalid-protocol-version
cases.detail: gateway Dataplane: dataplane response backend marker identifies controlplane fallback; exchange=Exchange { mode: Dataplane, request: RequestCapture { mode: Dataplane, method: "POST", url: "http://127.0.0.1:8080/servers/3f33286667d34b65a31c3bafd30e4c21/mcp", headers: {"accept": "application/json, text/event-stream", "authorization": "<redacted>", "content-type": "application/json", "mcp-protocol-version": "unsupported-version", "mcp-session-id": "<redacted>"}, body: Some("{\"id\":20,\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"ping\"}") }, status: 400, headers: {"connection": "close", "content-length": "153", "content-type": "application/json", "date": "Sun, 12 Jul 2026 16:46:21 GMT", "server": "nginx", "x-accel-buffering": "no", "x-cf-integration-backend": "controlplane-fallback"}, body: "<response body rejected before reading>", message: None, session_id: None }

cases.name: transport.get-behaviour
cases.detail: GET returned an HTTP 200 SSE stream

cases.name: transport.malformed-json
cases.detail: expected HTTP 400 or JSON-RPC Parse Error -32700, got HTTP 415

response.body: fail to deserialize request body key must be a string at line 1 column 2

cases.name: transport.malformed-jsonrpc
cases.detail: malformed JSON-RPC returned HTTP 415 without HTTP 400 or a valid -32600 Invalid Request envelope

response.body: fail to deserialize request body data did not match any variant of untagged enum JsonRpcMessage
